ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adjustment_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the adjustment block (e.g., Image quality improver block) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment block */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the block is associated with */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* Input format supported by the block (e.g., JPEG, PNG, TIFF) */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Output format supported by the block (e.g., JPEG, PNG, TIFF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register (e.g., ADJ0_ENH_SHP1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjustment block the register belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the register (e.g., integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bits" (
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit */,
  "bit_name" TEXT /* Name of the bit (e.g., SHP_H_ON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the bit belongs to */,
  "bit_position" INTEGER /* Position of the bit in the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjustment block the setting belongs to */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the setting is associated with */,
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bit the setting is associated with */,
  "initial_value" INTEGER /* Initial value of the setting */,
  "setting_range" TEXT /* Range of values the setting can take (e.g., 0 to 1, 0 to 127) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the setting (e.g., integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_bit_id FOREIGN KEY ("bit_id") REFERENCES bits ("bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES adjustment_blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., edge enhancement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., filter, transform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting the preference is associated with */,
  "custom_value" INTEGER /* Custom value set by the user for the setting */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting change */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the setting after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_history_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the algorithm */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory used by the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
